allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object {$_Name -like ''*Code*'' -or $_Name -like ''*python*'' -or $_Name -like ''*dbt*''} | Select-Object Id, Name, MainWindowTitle")
Bash(powershell -Command "& {Get-Process | Where-Object { $_Name -match ''Code|python|dbt'' } | Select-Object Id, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize}")
Bash(cmd /c "powershell -Command ""Get-Process Code | Select-Object Id, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize""")
Bash(cmd /c "powershell -Command ""Get-Process | Format-Table Id, Name -AutoSize"" 2>&1 | findstr /i ""code python dbt""")
